name: [BUG-002] ?min_price / ?max_price range filter is not implemented
description:
Feature gap: The product listing endpoint should support price-range
filtering via ?min_price=50&max_price=200, returning only products whose
price falls within that range. Currently the parameters are silently ignored
and all products are returned regardless of price.
descriptionHtml:
Feature gap: The product listing endpoint should support price-range
filtering via ?min_price=50&max_price=200, returning only products whose
price falls within that range. Currently the parameters are silently ignored
and all products are returned regardless of price.
statusMessage:
XFAIL BUG-002: GET /api/products/ should support ?min_price and ?max_price filters — not implemented

AssertionError: Product 'Desk Chair Pro' price $349.99 is outside ?min_price=50&max_price=200 filter range
assert 349.99 <= 200.0
statusTrace:
tests\api\test_known_failures.py:63: in test_list_products_price_range_filter_not_implemented
    assert 50.0 <= p["price"] <= 200.0, (
E   AssertionError: Product 'Desk Chair Pro' price $349.99 is outside ?min_price=50&max_price=200 filter range
E   assert 349.99 <= 200.0
